headline: Magic Formula Showdown: Why CVS Beats Qualcomm and Valero for Retirees
summary: Joel Greenblatt's Magic Formula ranks stocks on earnings yield and return on capital, but for retirees those two numbers can point straight toward disaster. Three stocks cleared the screen, and only one survives when income reliability and volatility enter the equation.
